title: Wittelsbachia insignis
taxonomy: Wittelsbachia insignis is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa and Madagascar. The plant belongs to the genus Wittelsbachia, which is a small genus of flowering plants. Wittelsbachia insignis is typically classified as a species of flowering plants, and its classification is further divided into its family, genus, and species levels. The plant's classification makes it a part of the larger angiosperm clade within the plant kingdom.
